title: SDA Issues Special Notice Seeking PWSA Ground Segment and AppFac Transition Studies
text:
Posted On: March 27, 2025
Responses Due: April 14, 2025
The Space Development Agency (SDA) is seeking executive summaries to prepare for 180-day studies on evolving the current Proliferated Warfighter Space Architecture (PWSA) ground segment (GS) and the Battle Management, Command, Control, and Communications (BMC3) software application factory (AppFac). SDA is interested in industry’s perspective on how to transition and expand the current PWSA ground and BMC3 segments, based on loosely-coupled modular open systems approach (MOSA) design principles.
Both the GS framework and AppFac transition efforts are envisioned to occur in parallel with deployment of Tranche 3 of the PWSA.
This call for executive summaries falls under SDA Systems, Technologies, and Emerging Capabilities (STEC) Broad Agency Announcement (BAA), Focus Area #4; Global Battle Management.
